title: Module 5 — Functions: Reusable Code
goal: Package code so you can reuse it.

lessons.title: Defining and Calling a Function
lessons.concept: def to define, then call by name.

challenge.prompt: Define a function called greet that prints hi, then call it once.

lessons.title: Inputs and Outputs: Arguments and return
lessons.concept: Pass arguments in; return a value out.

challenge.prompt: Write a function add(a, b) that returns a + b. Print the result of add(2, 3).
Write a function square(n) that returns n times n. Print square(4).

lessons.title: Using Libraries: import
lessons.concept: Bring in extra tools with import.

challenge.prompt: Import the math library and print the whole-number square root of 16.
